title: jobops.outreach.logged v1
description: Emitted by job-ops (internal/bus/publish.go, EventOutreachLogged) when a networking/outreach touchpoint with a contact is logged. Backfilled schema — channel had live Redis traffic with no registered schema.

contact_name.description: Name of the contact this outreach was directed at.

follow_up_date.description: Date to follow up on this outreach, if scheduled.
